title: Uniswap V3 LP - REKT
relevance_summary: Passive liquidity providers losing to impermanent loss due to complex concentrated liquidity positions
red_flags: Impermanent loss outweighing trading fee income
Passive LPs losing to active LPs
summary: Uniswap V3 LPs are losing money due to impermanent loss, with passive LPs losing more than active LPs. This highlights the risks associated with complex liquidity provision mechanisms.
